prompt_text:
### Demographics: 78-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 16 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 92.8 kg; Height 179.2 cm; BMI 28.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.5%; 9 months ago 8.8%; 6 months ago 8.3%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 269mg/dL; 9 months ago 238mg/dL; 6 months ago 213mg/dL; 3 months ago 201mg/dL; current 134mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 93.9kg; 9 months ago 92.7kg; 6 months ago 92.3kg; 3 months ago 92.9kg; current 92.8kg), Height (12 months ago 179.2cm; 9 months ago 179.2cm; 6 months ago 179.2cm; 3 months ago 179.2cm; current 179.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 28.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 141mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 81mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 91U/L; 9 months ago 81U/L; 6 months ago 82U/L; 3 months ago 79U/L; current 90U/L), AST (12 months ago 80U/L; 9 months ago 78U/L; 6 months ago 69U/L; 3 months ago 70U/L; current 79U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 61mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 60mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; current 57mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 282mg/g; 9 months ago 207mg/g; 6 months ago 199mg/g; 3 months ago 235mg/g; current 204mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 80mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 38mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 118mg/dL; 9 months ago 121mg/dL; 6 months ago 119mg/dL; 3 months ago 121mg/dL; current 127mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
